message:
Retain parser buffers across parses and pool input buffers

doc_free no longer calls deinit — parser tape, string buffer, and
stack arrays are retained and reused by parseFromSlice automatically.
Add persistent input buffer with doubling growth (ensureInputBuffer)
to eliminate per-parse WASM page allocator round-trips. Switch all
encode paths (parse, writeStringToMemory, validate, deepCompare) from
encoder.encode to encodeInto to avoid intermediate Uint8Array copies.
